name: @kampus/d1-rest
description: Single canonical D1 REST transport (makeD1Rest) — the one D1Database-shaped binding over the Cloudflare D1 REST query API that preview-seed / fts-backfill / moderator-grant all import, so a transport fix (e.g. the meta.changes mapping #940) lands once instead of in triplicate (issue #941). A true leaf — no @kampus/web — so fts-backfill's @kampus/web prod-dep stays acyclic.
